text:

Author: emaste

Log:
  vt: add Ctrl+/ key mapping

  This matches Xorg's handling of Ctrl+/ and may be useful as a tmux
  escape.

  PR:		212197
  Submitted by:	martin at sugioarto.com
  Tested by:	Arshan Khanifar <arshankhanifar_gmail.com>
  MFC after:	2 weeks
  Relnotes:	Yes
